Audit remaining 29 routes for sensitivity; any route that reads or mutates state must be behind the protected group. Coordinate with probe PH-04/PH-10 remediation in Group C.

forwarded.effect: Silent integer truncation to uint32 produces wrong size/index; potential buffer over-read or incorrect model geometry in converted output
